steps.title: Read the function value from the graph
steps.content: The graph of $y = f(x)$ passes through the point $(9, 7)$. This means when $x = 9$, the output is $y = 7$. By function notation, $f(9) = 7$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
steps.formula: $$\text{If point } (a, b) \text{ is on the graph of } y = f(x), \text{ then } f(a) = b$$
